nodes.label: Terminal Hugo theme (vendored third-party theme, panr/hugo-theme-terminal v4)
nodes.author: Radek Koziel (panr)
nodes.rationale: Vendored third-party Hugo theme (MIT licensed, by panr) installed under themes/terminal/. The repo's recent commit history includes '2d1fb12 Switch site theme to Terminal' (following an earlier switch to Hugo.386), so this theme is the currently active site theme for mebucca.github.io. It supplies fully customizable Terminal.css color schemes, Fira Code monospaced font, Chroma-based syntax highlighting, image/code shortcodes, and TOML-based configuration (contentTypeName, showMenuItems, fullWidthTheme, centerTheme, autoCover, dateFormat, menu, twitter cards, etc.). It is not the user's own writing; extracted structurally as vendor documentation rather than analyzed as original content.
